title: urtica incisa var. linearifolia
intro: Urtica incisa var. linearifolia, also known as linear-leaved Japanese nettle, is a variety of the Urtica incisa plant, a species of stinging nettle native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Urtica incisa var. linearifolia include reducing inflammation, alleviating symptoms of arthritis and gout, and supporting urinary health. Urtica incisa var. linearifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for topical application, such as creams and salves, to treat skin irritations and wounds.
